calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-03-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

John A. Kelly, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Kiera Peacock.
Christopher J. Nevis, Esq. for and with the Defendant: Vestil Manufacturing Corp.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement amount of $90,000.00 in exchange for dismissal with prejudice to be executed within 5 days. Each side to bear own fees, costs and liens.
Parties agreed to terms on the record, matter was deemed settled by the court, and was set on the CRC dismissal calendar for July 3, 2012 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.
